title: Evalicious Giveaway
excerpt: I've always been a huge fan of Evalicious and her adorable handmade products - especially her mini books! - and am thrilled to be offering a giveaway and a coupon code to her shop ! Evalicious specializes in cling mount,…
body:
I've always been a huge fan of Evalicious and her adorable handmade products - especially her mini books! - and am thrilled to be offering a giveaway and a coupon code to her shop!

Evalicious specializes in cling mount, deep etch, red rubberstamps, paper tags & flairs that are perfect for scrapbooking and other paper projects. They also carry mini art journals that are a great alternative to documenting your memories.

CONNECT WITH EVALICIOUS | Facebook | Twitter| Blog

COUPON CODES: Spend $100 or more and get free shipping plus an extra little something - enter code: AMYFREESHIP (Canada & the USA only). International friends get $10 off shipping - please use code: AMY10OFFSHIP.

GIVEAWAY is now closed. Evalicious is giving away a $35 eGift Card to one lucky winner. Leave a comment. Giveaway will close March 12 at 8am and a winner will be announced shortly after. The winner is: #89 Ashley Michelson says: March 9, 2013 at 4:52 pm I adore Evalicious! Thank you for the chance to win!! :) 

Congrats! Thanks to everyone who entered, and remember you can still your coupon codes!
